title: OpenLetter Connect
description: A mailing automation platform where users create templates, manage contacts, and execute mailing campaigns.
longDescription: Developed a scalable mailing platform enabling users to create templates, manage contacts, and place orders. Enhanced the system using agentic microservices where user goals trigger automated workflows handled by agents responsible for order creation, contact processing, and dispatch.

title: InvoTeams
description: A collaborative project management platform similar to freelance marketplaces.
longDescription: Built dashboards and task workflows for team collaboration. Integrated APIs and optimized performance for real-time updates.

title: Predicto
description: A prediction marketplace where users forecast outcomes.
longDescription: Developed dynamic UI using React and Redux with real-time API integrations to support prediction-based interactions.

title: InvoCom
description: A customer communication and knowledge base platform.
longDescription: Developed promotional website using Gatsby and Strapi CMS with GraphQL integration.

title: QuickXi
description: An online platform builder for creating stores quickly.
longDescription: Built promotional website using Gatsby and Strapi with focus on performance and responsiveness.

title: Involympics
longDescription: Developed features for player registration, team drafting, and admin dashboards for managing events.
